Hero.title: <title1>Timeless</title1><title2>Minimalism</title2>
Hero.description: <description1>Elevated essentials. Contemporary silhouettes.</description1> <description2>Designed for a life of quiet distinction.</description2>

About.title: <title1>Quiet Luxury</title1><title2>Meaningful Design</title2>
About.description: At Noiré, we believe true luxury lies in simplicity, craftsmanship, and timeless design. Each piece is thoughtfully created to transcend seasons and trends — a wardrobe for life.

SignIn.title: Welcome back
SignIn.description: Sign in to your account to access your orders, wishes and preferences.

SignUp.title: Create Account
SignUp.description: Join Noiré and be the first to discover new arrivals, exclusive offers and more.

Form.checkboxLabel: I agree to receive marketing emails and updates from NOIRÉ.

Errors.minLengthName: Name must be at least 2 characters.
Errors.maxLengthName: Name must be at most 100 characters.
Errors.invalidNameCharacters: Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes.
Errors.maxLengthEmail: Email must be at most 255 characters.
Errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
Errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
Errors.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 100 characters.
Errors.passwordComplexity: Password must include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.

Confirmation.title: Check Your Email
Confirmation.message: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.

AuthCodeError.title: Confirmation Code Expired
AuthCodeError.message: The link used to confirm your account has expired or is invalid. Please request a new confirmation link.
